system.name: Curl if Flow
system.author: Weatherman118
system.description: NASDAQ small-cap momentum system. Entry on Stoch RSI K curl from below 20 with Smoothed HA green and price above ZLSMA-50.

tradingview_chart_settings.chart_type: Heikin Ashi (replaced by custom Smoothed HA overlay)

smoothed_heikin_ashi.name: Smoothed Heikin Ashi (SHA)
smoothed_heikin_ashi.signal: Green candle = bullish momentum, Red = bearish
smoothed_heikin_ashi.entry_requirement: Current candle must be green at entry

zlsma_50.name: Zero Lag SMA 50 (ZLSMA-50)
zlsma_50.signal: Price above = in flow / bullish bias
zlsma_50.entry_requirement: Price must be above ZLSMA-50 at entry

stochastic_rsi.name: Stochastic RSI
stochastic_rsi.entry_requirement: K crosses UP through 20, K above D
stochastic_rsi.mystery: Exact K/D values at entry unknown — screenshots of 1m chart at entry will crack this

conditions.name: Stoch RSI Curl
conditions.description: K line crosses UP through the 20 level, K above D

conditions.name: SHA Green
conditions.description: Smoothed Heikin Ashi candle is green at time of entry

conditions.name: Above ZLSMA-50
conditions.description: Current price is above the ZLSMA-50 yellow line

conditions.name: Volume Surge
conditions.description: Current bar volume >= 1.5x the 20-bar average volume

conditions.name: In Float Universe
conditions.description: Stock float < 20M shares, price $0.10-$15, NASDAQ listed

conditions.name: Catalyst Present
conditions.description: Manual check: news, halt-resume, day 2-3 runner, or China momentum

catalyst_tiers.tier_1: Major news: FDA, merger, earnings beat — highest priority
catalyst_tiers.tier_2: Halt-resume plays, sympathy moves, day 2-3 runners
catalyst_tiers.tier_3: China stocks in momentum cycle, low-float technical setups

preferred_setups: Day 2 or Day 3 runner with consolidation

scaling.initial: 1/3 of planned position at first entry
scaling.add_1: 1/3 on confirmation (price holds, SHA stays green)

stop_loss.note: No exceptions — exit if -8% from entry

targets.name: T3
targets.action: Trail 10% stop on final 1/3 — let it run

trailing_stop.note: 10% trail from highest close on 5m chart

conditions: Stock pulled back to ZLSMA-50 and bounced
Stoch RSI reset below 50 and curling up again
SHA turned green again after red
re_entry_rules.note: Re-entries observed in 18 of 52 historical trades — very common pattern

premarket.note: Best entries — low competition, big moves before RTH open

midday.note: Avoid unless very strong setup — chop kills momentum

questions_after_each_trade: Did all 6 conditions align at entry?
Did I size correctly per the 2% rule?
Did I move stop to BE after T1?
Did I let the runner run with trailing stop?

grade_scale.A+: All 6 conditions, perfect execution of exits
grade_scale.C: 4 or fewer conditions, or broke a rule

paper_trading_workflow.step_1: Pre-market scan: find catalysts, build watchlist by 7am EST
paper_trading_workflow.step_2: Check each candidate: price range, float, NASDAQ
paper_trading_workflow.step_3: Load 5m chart in TradingView with SHA + ZLSMA-50 + Stoch RSI
paper_trading_workflow.step_5: Paper trade the entry, log in journal immediately
paper_trading_workflow.step_7: Post-trade: grade A/B/C, note what conditions were present
paper_trading_workflow.step_8: End of day: paste recap text into discord_parser.py, update trades-parsed.json

five_questions_to_crack_secret_sauce: What is the exact Stoch RSI K value at entry — above 20 crossing, or already at 30-40?
Does SHA need to be green for multiple consecutive candles, or just the current one?
Is the ZLSMA-50 check on the 5m or 1m chart?
What volume multiplier triggers — 1.5x, 2x, or is it eyeballed?
On re-entries, does he wait for a full Stoch RSI reset below 20, or just below 50?
